Registry / Terms / type evaluation

type evaluation

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #01466 · 11 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.5view ↗

systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type (pattern) of measuring instruments against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.5
    systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type (pattern) of measuring instruments against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIML 2022.
  2. MEDIUM 11 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

11 distinct definitions across 11 publications.

11 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
20102008OIML D 30:2008302159
- G.3-1 systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or (VIML 2.5) more specimens of an identified type of measuring instrument against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved

pending

(V systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type of measuring instrument against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in an evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved IML 2.5)

202X2019OIML D034:20193.1.1603594
conformity assessment procedure on one or more specimens of an identified type (pattern) of measuring instruments which results in an evalution report and / or an evaluation certificate
pending
202X2004OIML R 111-1:20042.17.101466
systematic examination and testing of the performance of a type of weights or weight sets against the documented requirements of this Recommendation, the results of which are contained in a test report
pending

systematic examination and testing of the performance of a type ofweights or weight sets against the documented requirements ofthis Recommendation, the results of which are contained in a test report
pending
20102008OIML D 31:20083.1.1902186
systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or [OIML V 1:2000, 2.5] more specimens of an identified type (pattern) of measuring instruments against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved
pending
202X2004OIML R 135:20042.3801877
systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more samples of an identified type of measuring instrument against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved
pending
202X2008OIML D 29:20083-G.3-202154
systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type of measuring instruments against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved [VIML 2.5]
pending
202X2024OIML R049-1:20243.4.1202432
systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or more specimens of an identified type or pattern of measuring instrument against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved
pending
20102004OIML R 135:20042.3801877
systematic examination and testing of the performance of one or The term "pattern" is used in legal metrology more samples of an identified type of measuring instrument against documented requirements, the results of which are contained in the evaluation report, in order to determine whether the type may be approved
